CustomObject.description: Statutory post-permit inspection schedules derived from Analysis 2 of the PermitTEC/permit-matrix corpus. Seeded with 30 sector-permit combinations covering NPDES, SMCRA, MMPA, CWA 401, CZMA, and related monitoring obligations. Read by NEPA_Permit_Issued_Schedule_Creator to auto-generate inspection tasks when a permit is issued.
CustomObject.label: NEPA Inspection Schedule

fields.description: Permit type string matching nepa_permit_type__c on nepa_required_permit__c (e.g., "CWA Section 402 NPDES Construction").
fields.label: Permit Type

fields.description: Sector key matching nepa_sector__c on IndividualApplication (e.g., "Energy Production and Management").
fields.label: Sector

fields.description: Lead federal agency responsible for this permit type (e.g., "BLM", "FERC/DOE", "USACE").
fields.label: Lead Agency

fields.description: Type of inspection required (e.g., "SWPPP Inspection", "MMPA Visual Survey", "SMCRA Site Inspection", "DMR Quarterly"). Populates Visit.nepa_discipline__c when tasks are auto-created.
fields.label: Inspection Type

fields.description: Interval in days between required inspections (e.g., 7 = weekly, 90 = quarterly, 365 = annual). Used by NEPA_Permit_Issued_Schedule_Creator to compute task due dates.
fields.label: Frequency (Days)

fields.description: True when a physical field inspection is required (not just a report submission). Drives the mobile F-05 inspection form creation vs. a document-only task.
fields.label: Field Inspection Required

fields.description: Agency or party responsible for conducting the inspection (may differ from permit-issuing agency, e.g., "Project Operator / EPA").
fields.label: Responsible Agency

fields.description: Condition that constitutes noncompliance and triggers enforcement action or litigation. Surfaced in the mobile inspection form as a compliance checklist item.
fields.label: Noncompliance Trigger

fields.description: Litigation risk if this inspection obligation is not met: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, or VERY_HIGH. Derived from PermitTEC corpus analysis and statutory citizen-suit provisions.
fields.label: Post-Permit Litigation Risk

fields.description: CFR or USC citation for the inspection obligation (e.g., "33 USC §1342; 40 CFR §122.26"). Populated on Task subject line for statutory traceability.
fields.label: Statutory Authority

fields.description: Inactive schedules are excluded from task creation. SubscriberControlled so agencies can disable permit types not applicable to their program.
fields.label: Active
